executives.name: Haviv Ilan
executives.background: Haviv Ilan is president and chief executive officer of Texas Instruments. He has been with the company since 1999, serving in various leadership roles including chief operating officer and senior vice president of Analog Signal Chain.

executives.name: Rafael Lizardi
executives.background: Rafael Lizardi is senior vice president and chief financial officer. He joined TI in 2001 and has held several financial leadership positions, including corporate controller.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Chief Accounting Officer

executives.name: Ahmad Bahai
executives.background: Ahmad Bahai is senior vice president and chief technology officer, responsible for guiding TI’s technology strategy and research.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer
Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Mark Gary
executives.background: Mark Gary is senior vice president of Analog Power Products. He has held various leadership roles in TI's analog business units.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Analog Power Products
Senior Vice President, Analog Power Products

executives.name: Cynthia Hoff Trochu
executives.background: Cynthia Hoff Trochu is senior vice president, secretary and general counsel. She joined TI in 1993.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Secretary and General Counsel
Senior Vice President, Secretary, General Counsel, and Chief Compliance Officer

executives.name: Carrie Cox
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Humacyte, Inc.

executives.name: Colette Kress
executives.background: Colette M. Kress joined NVIDIA in 2013 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to NVIDIA, Ms. Kress served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of the Business Software and Services division of Cisco Systems, Inc. from 2010 to 2013. She also spent 13 years at Microsoft Corporation in various finance roles, including Chief Financial Officer of the Server and Tools division. Ms. Kress holds a B.S. degree in Finance from the University of Arizona and an M.B.A. degree from the University of Washington.

executives.name: Janet Clark
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and CFO of Marathon Oil Corporation.

executives.name: Jean Hobby
executives.background: Former Strategy Officer at PricewaterhouseCoopers, LLP.

executives.name: John Van Scoter
executives.background: Mr. Van Scoter has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since June 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Mr. Van Scoter served as Vice President of SRI International, a nonprofit research institute, from 2019 to 2023. From 2010 to 2018, he was the CEO and President of eSolar, Inc., a concentrated solar power technology company. Earlier in his career, he spent over 25 years at Texas Instruments.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President (held various roles including SVP, Alternative Energy Strategy and SVP, General Manager of DLP Products Division)

executives.name: Mark Blinn
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Flowserve Corporation.

executives.name: Martin Craighead
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Baker Hughes Incorporated.

executives.name: Pamela Patsley
executives.background: Former Executive Chairman of MoneyGram International, Inc.

executives.name: Remi El-Ouazzane
executives.background: Remi El-Ouazzane is President, Microcontrollers and Digital ICs Group, a position he has held since 2022. He is a member of ST’s Executive Committee. Prior to joining ST, El-Ouazzane was Chief Operating Officer of Intel’s Artificial Intelligence Products Group. He also served as CEO of Movidius before its acquisition by Intel.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Worldwide General Manager, Open Multimedia Applications Platform (OMAP)

executives.name: Richard Templeton
executives.background: Rich Templeton is chairman of the board. He served as TI's president and CEO from 2004 to 2023.

executives.name: Robert Sanchez
executives.background: Chairman and CEO of Ryder System, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ronald Kirk
executives.background: Senior Counsel at Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP and former U.S. Trade Representative.
